methods.name: send
methods.description: Send a sequence of bytes through this CHOP. To serialize non-byte values (example floats or integers) there are several python modules to do this, such as pickle or struct. * `*messages` - any number of messages to send .

methods.name: sendBalance
methods.description: Sends a Balance event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendNoteOn
methods.description: Sends a Note On event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *index - The MIDI index/note. Valid ranges are 0 to 127, or 1 to 128, dependent on the One Based Index parameter. *value - (Optional) The MIDI note value. Valid ranges are determined by the CHOP Note Normalize parameter. Maximum when not specified.

methods.name: sendPolyKeyPressure
methods.description: Sends a Polyphonic Key Pressure event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *index - The MIDI index/note. Valid ranges are 0 to 127, or 1 to 128, dependent on the One Based Index parameter. *value - The MIDI pressure value. Valid ranges are determined by the CHOP Note Normalize parameter.

methods.name: sendPitchBend
methods.description: Sends a Pitch Bend event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The pitch bend value. Valid ranges are between 0 and 16384.

methods.name: sendEffectsDepth
methods.description: Sends a Effects Depth event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *index - Valid index ranges are 1 to 5. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendMonoOn
methods.description: Sends a Mono On/Poly Off event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: panic
methods.description: Sends a volume off event for each channel and note off event for each note.

methods.name: sendDamperPedal
methods.description: Sends a Damper Pedal event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendChannelPressure
methods.description: Sends a Channel Pressure event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The channel pressure. Valid ranges are dependent on the Note Normalize parameter.

methods.name: sendControl
methods.description: Sends a Controller event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *index - The MIDI controller index. Valid ranges are 0 to 127, or 1 to 128, dependent on the One Based Index parameter.. *value - The MIDI control value. Valid ranges are determined by the CHOP Controller Normalize and Controller Format parameters.

methods.name: sendDataDecrement
methods.description: Sends a Data Decrement event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendAllNotesOff
methods.description: Sends a All Notes Off event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendSoundController
methods.description: Sends a Sound Controller event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *index - Valid index ranges are 1 to 10. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendBankSelect
methods.description: Sends a Bank Select event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendMainVolume
methods.description: Sends a Main Volume event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendSoftPedal
methods.description: Sends a Soft Pedal event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendLocalControl
methods.description: Sends a Local Control Controllers event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendPolyOn
methods.description: Sends a Poly On/Mono Off event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendPan
methods.description: Sends a Pan event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendResetAllControllers
methods.description: Sends a Reset All Controllers event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendBreathController
methods.description: Sends a Breath Controller event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendPortamentoTime
methods.description: Sends a Portamento Time event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendDataIncrement
methods.description: Sends a Data Increment event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendFootController
methods.description: Sends a Foot Controller event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendHold2
methods.description: Sends a Hold2 event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendSostenuto
methods.description: Sends a Sostenuto event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendOmniOff
methods.description: Sends a Omni Off event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendGeneralPurposeController
methods.description: Sends a General Purpose Controller event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *index - Valid index ranges are 1 to 8. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendNoteOff
methods.description: Sends a Note Off event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *index - The MIDI index/note. Valid ranges are 0 to 127, or 1 to 128, dependent on the One Based Index parameter. *value - (Optional) The MIDI note value. Valid ranges are determined by the CHOP Note Normalize parameter. Minimum when not specified.

methods.name: sendExclusive
methods.description: Send a sytem exclusive message through this CHOP. The System Exclusive start and end character are added to the message. Messages can any combination of strings, byte arrays, or individual single-byte numeric values. To serialize non-byte values (example floats or integers) there are several python modules to do this, such as pickle or struct. * `*messages` - any number of messages to send

methods.name: sendPortamento
methods.description: Sends a Portamento event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendEffectControl
methods.description: Sends a Main Volume event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *index - Valid index ranges are 1 to 2. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendLegatoFootswitch
methods.description: Sends a Legato Footswitch event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendModulationWheel
methods.description: Sends a Modulation Wheel event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendProgram
methods.description: Sends a Program Change event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI program change. Valid ranges are dependent on the Controller Normalize parameter.

methods.name: sendOmniOn
methods.description: Sends a Omni On event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendPortamentoControl
methods.description: Sends a Portamento Control event through the CHOP. *channel - The MIDI event channel. Valid ranges are 1 to 16. *value - The MIDI value. Valid ranges are 0 to 127.

methods.name: sendTimecode
methods.description: Sends the timecode to the device as a full MTC message. *timecode - The timecode value to send to the device. Must be a tdu.Timecode object. Timecode rate must be 24, 25, 29.97 (drop-frame), or 30. See Timecode Class.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the MidioutCHOP Class wiki page
